[[File:EM081C3.jpg|thumb|right|[[Pazaak/Legends|Pazaak]] tables at the cantina.]]
The '''Entertainment Module 081 [[Cantina/Legends|Cantina]]''' was located within [[Entertainment Module 081]], which was a part of the massive [[Citadel Station]] that had been built in orbit above [[Telos IV]] in the wake of the [[Jedi Civil War]]. The cantina, according to the [[Droid/Legends|droid]] that tended its bar, served food and drinks from a wide variety of [[Planet/Legends|worlds]], possessed a [[Pazaak/Legends|pazaak]] room, hosted a [[Citadel Station swoop track|swoop track]], and, as its centerpiece, a stage that was frequented by [[Bith/Legends|Bith]] musicians and [[Twi'lek/Legends|Twi'lek]] dancers. During this time the patrons enjoyed the music, that several thousand years later would be played by a band in [[7-Gee Lounge|one of the cantinas]] of [[Tatooine/Legends|Tatooine]].
[[File:EM081C2.jpg|thumb|left|[[Twi'lek/Legends|Twi'lek]] dancers on the cantina's stage.]]

During her stay on Citadel Station, the Jedi Exile, [[Meetra Surik]], visited the cantina at least twice. While there, she freed the dancer [[Ramana]] from [[Slavery/Legends|slavery]], persuaded [[Luxa]] to let her into the [[Bumani Exchange Corporation]] (which was the front for [[Exchange|the Exchange]] on Citadel), and convinced a [[Czerka Arms/Legends|Czerka Corporation]] employee, [[Corrun Falt]], to unwittingly help the [[Ithorian/Legends|Ithorians]] in exposing Czerka's illegal actions in handling the [[Telosian Restoration Project]].

Some time later, during the [[Battle of Telos IV]], the cantina was placed on lockdown due to the attack on the station by the [[Sith Lord/Legends|Sith Lord]] [[Darth Nihilus]] and his [[Fleet/Legends|fleet]].

==Behind the scenes==
The music played in Entertainment Module 081 Cantina is the same one that can be originally heard in [[7-Gee Lounge]] from the [[Star Wars: Episode I The Phantom Menace (video game)|video game adaptation]] of [[Star Wars: Episode I The Phantom Menace|''Star Wars'': Episode I ''The Phantom Menace'']].

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic II: The Sith Lords]]'' {{1st}}
